text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading toward my office one morning when I
spot Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh... You take the relative frequency... and then to get the cumulative... you... you, uh... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh... it's only you. Can't you see I'm studying? I
have a test... coming up...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Model students... have to get straight A's... I don't have time... to... sleep...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's barely slept. I should probably
lighten her workload a bit.
